content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 22, 2026, focused on stabilizing the framework through critical bug fixes and extensive dependency management. Key efforts included repairing Milady CI regressions, updating core Rust and Python dependencies, and preparing for future architectural improvements.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Milady CI and System Stability**
*   Resolved Milady CI regressions by restoring website blocker and Telegram export functionality.
*   Replaced stale subpath imports with package-root imports and fixed LifeOps signal client method collisions ([#7008](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7008)).

**Dependency Management and Security Updates**
*   Performed comprehensive updates across the stack, including Rust crates (`prost`, `sha2`, `getrandom`, `cbc`, `uuid`), Python benchmarks (`torch`, `transformers`, `opencv-python`, `matplotlib`, `gymnasium`, `tqdm`, `pandas`), and various JavaScript/TypeScript packages ([#7033](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7033), [#7031](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7031), [#7030](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7030), [#7028](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7028), [#7026](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7026), [#7023](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7023), [#7021](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7021), [#7018](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7018), [#7017](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7017), [#7016](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7016), [#7014](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7014), [#7012](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7012), [#7039](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7039)).
*   Updated mobile and infrastructure dependencies, including Android components and Supabase Postgres tags ([#7006](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7006), [#7015](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7015), [#7011](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7011), [#7010](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7010)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Feature Work:** [#7032](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7032) (Local inference hub, provider switcher, and agent local probes) and [#7020](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7020) (2.x/v3 clean up).
*   **Optimization:** [#7013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7013) (Reduce prompt bloat).
*   **Dependency Maintenance:** Multiple PRs opened for cargo, npm, and language-specific dependency bumps, including [#7047](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7047), [#7046](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7046), [#7045](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7045), [#7044](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7044), [#7043](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7043), [#7042](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7042), [#7041](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7041), and [#7040](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7040).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *None.*

## NEW ISSUES
**Telegram Integration**
*   [#7009](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7009): A follow-up is required regarding Telegram read receipts to fetch by message IDs and avoid nested lookup, building upon the fixes implemented in [#7008](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7008).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None.*
